After Surgery 
URL of this page: https://medlineplus.gov/aftersurgery.html 
After Surgery
Also called: Postoperative care, Recovery from surgery 
Summary 
After any operation , you'll have some side effects. There is usually some pain with surgery. There may also be swelling and soreness around the area that the surgeon cut. Your surgeon can tell you which side effects to expect.
There can also be complications. These are unplanned events linked to the operation. Some complications are infection, too much bleeding, reaction to anesthesia , or accidental injury. Some people
